patches.description: Saros/nodal conflation: replaced 'known for over 2,000 years — encoded in Antikythera mechanism' with Clairaut 1749 attribution + Saros distinction
Saros/nodal conflation: replaced '(known for over 2,000 years, encoded in Antikythera mechanism ~100 BC)' with '(value derived by Clairaut 1749; related Saros eclipse cycle known for >2,000 years)'
Antecedent ambiguity: restructured sentence so Saros eclipse cycle is grammatical subject of '...observed for over 2,000 years', not the nodal regression period
millennia→centuries: replaced 'publicly known for millennia' with 'textbook physics for centuries (Clairaut, 1749)'

notes: WIN-020 has had a persistent Saros/nodal conflation pattern across 6 curmudgeon cycles. The c6 finding (surface-propagation gap) is important: when patching a factual error in detail_evidence, the decider must also scan tldr_evidence and finding for the same prose pattern.
